---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for The Real Middle
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I find it difficult to [...] when using the income calculator."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Data Requirements

Does this feature require new data sources or datasets? If so, please specify:
- Data source name and URL
- Frequency of updates needed
- Any licensing considerations

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help illustrate the feature request.
